VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: mechlike
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android runs the same standard subroutine ordinary mechanoids do, delegating part of its decision-making to a supervising mechanitor. A mechanitor can connect and disconnect it like any of their mechs: it costs 5 bandwidth, can be assigned to a control group with a work mode, and obeys within command range.\n\nWith so much of its processing handed off, the android has no operator of its own until a mechanitor takes oversight - until then it stands dormant, powered down and unable to act.
